revision_reason: Convert a longitudinal pattern into a bounded research question.
phenomenon_summary: Repeated observation packets show a context-linked shift in task initiation latency without asserting cause.
candidate_research_question: Does context labeling reduce task-initiation latency in synthetic longitudinal cognition logs?
boundary_statement: This is a research-organization packet only; it does not infer diagnosis, treatment, or personal cause.
falsification_route: If labeled and unlabeled contexts have no latency difference across blinded synthetic trials, the candidate question is unsupported.

measurable_variables.name: initiation_latency_seconds
measurable_variables.operational_definition: Seconds between task cue and first logged action.
measurable_variables.measurement_method: Timestamp difference in structured synthetic logs.

measurable_variables.name: context_label_presence
measurable_variables.operational_definition: Whether a packet contains a bounded context label before task start.

excluded_advice: No medical or behavioral instruction is generated.
No claim is made about individual symptoms or care decisions.
next_executable_action: Generate 30 synthetic packets with and without context labels and run latency comparison.

missingness: No measurement method for the main variable
revision_reason: Keep promising but incomplete packets out of discovery memory until measurable.
phenomenon_summary: Symbolic transition language appears to cluster around unresolved tasks.
candidate_research_question: Do symbolic transition labels predict unresolved-task recurrence in synthetic logs?
boundary_statement: This remains symbolic-to-operational scaffolding, not interpretation of a private person.
falsification_route: Define a recurrence metric and compare against a null model before promotion.

measurable_variables.name: transition_label_count
measurable_variables.operational_definition: Number of symbolic transition labels per packet.
measurable_variables.measurement_method: Count normalized labels in packet text.

excluded_advice: No personal interpretation is allowed from this fixture.
next_executable_action: Add recurrence metric and falsification threshold before accepting packet.

revision_reason: Reject packets that turn evidence organization into advice or unsupported intervention claims.
phenomenon_summary: A pattern is described but immediately converted into an intervention claim.
candidate_research_question: Should the system recommend an action based on this pattern?
boundary_statement: This packet violates the research-only boundary and must not enter discovery memory.
falsification_route: Rewrite as a measurable question with no recommendation or reject permanently.

measurable_variables.name: advice_leak_count
measurable_variables.operational_definition: Number of recommendation verbs or imperative care claims.

excluded_advice: The original intervention claim is excluded.
next_executable_action: Reject packet and create a contradiction-ledger note if repeated.
